ruleDescriptions.ASCII001: Source file paths must be ASCII-only.
ruleDescriptions.DEP001: Domain layer must not depend on application/infrastructure/bootstrap/controller namespaces.
ruleDescriptions.DEP002: Application contracts must not depend on infrastructure/bootstrap/controller namespaces.
ruleDescriptions.NAME001: Interfaces under application contracts must start with 'I'.
ruleDescriptions.NAME002: Classes under application/use-cases must end with 'UseCase'.
ruleDescriptions.VO000: Domain value-object classes should end with 'Vo'.
ruleDescriptions.INFH001: Infrastructure helper classes should end with 'Helper'.
ruleDescriptions.INFX001: Infrastructure extension classes should end with 'Extensions'.
ruleDescriptions.INFC001: Infrastructure constants classes should end with 'Constants'.
ruleDescriptions.PATH001: Classes matching '*Monitor' must be placed under '/monitors/'.
ruleDescriptions.PATH002: Classes matching '*UseCase' must be placed under '/use-cases/'.
ruleDescriptions.PATH003: Classes matching '*Helper' must be placed under '/infrastructure/helpers/'.
ruleDescriptions.PATH004: Classes matching '*Extensions' must be placed under '/infrastructure/extensions/'.
ruleDescriptions.PATH005: Classes matching '*Constants' must be placed under '/infrastructure/constants/'.
ruleDescriptions.FILE001: File name should match the primary declared type.
ruleDescriptions.MEDIATR001: MediatR usage is forbidden in the domain layer.
ruleDescriptions.MEDIATR002: MediatR usage is forbidden in the infrastructure layer.
ruleDescriptions.CFG001: Config override assignment is restricted to approved paths.
ruleDescriptions.CFG002: Settings file write is restricted to approved paths.
ruleDescriptions.CQRS100: Command records must be nested in '*BusinessUseCase' under application/use-cases.
ruleDescriptions.CQRS101: Query records must be nested in '*BusinessUseCase' under application/use-cases.
ruleDescriptions.CQRS102: Use-case files must be '*UseCase.cs' and contain only record command/query members.
ruleDescriptions.SEV001: SetSeverity mutation is restricted to approved paths.
ruleDescriptions.DIP001: Constructor dependencies in target layers must prefer interfaces.
ruleDescriptions.MOCK001: Key interfaces must have at least one mock/fake/stub implementation.
ruleDescriptions.CONST001: Constants classes may only contain const or static readonly fields.
